tasks.name: Ingest Data
tasks.description: 3 DataFlow Gen2 (DF_Finance, DF_HR, DF_Operations) load 17 CSV files into BronzeLH. Orchestrated by PL_HorizonBooks pipeline.

tasks.name: Transform and Enrich
tasks.description: NB01: Bronze to Silver (clean, deduplicate, schema enforcement). NB02: Web enrichment (exchange rates, holidays, country data, book metadata). NB03: Silver to Gold star schema (10 Dim + 8 Fact). NB04: Holt-Winters forecasting (5 tables).

tasks.name: Medallion Lakehouses
tasks.description: BronzeLH (raw CSV), SilverLH (finance/hr/operations/web schemas), GoldLH (dim/fact/analytics schemas, 23 tables, SQL endpoint). DimDate generated via SQL script.

tasks.name: Semantic Model
tasks.description: HorizonBooksModel: Direct Lake on GoldLH, 23 tables, 27 relationships, 96 DAX measures, schemaName bindings.

tasks.name: Reports and AI Agent
tasks.description: HorizonBooksAnalytics (10 pages) + HorizonBooksForecasting (5 pages) PBIR reports. HorizonBooks DataAgent for natural-language Q&A (F64+).
